name: Refried Beans with Cheese
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cooked pinto beans or 16 oz. can, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the onion and garlic to the skillet. Sauté until the onion is transparent.
3. Add the cooked pinto beans (or drained canned beans) to the skillet.
4. Mash the beans into a paste using a potato masher or spatula.
5. Mix in the chili powder, salt, and freshly ground pepper.
6. Sprinkle the shredded cheddar cheese on top of the refried beans.
7. Serve as a side dish.
